meaning: n.一种以黄麻为底之羊毛织花地毯
examples: Sr. had a grandfather who owned an Axminster, a twelve-seater flying carpet that the whole family could ride on.

When 75-year-old Sydie Bones from Axminster was planning her son’s 50th birthday celebrations, she wanted the day to be marked by more than just snapshots for the family album.
Axminster Carpets has reopened for business after a deal was struck to save the company.
